LanguageData.RealRim_WasteStorageStatus: Waste water: {0} / {1} L Fecal sludge: {2} / {3} kg Current processing: {4} L/day Fresh-water recovery: {5} L/day {6}
LanguageData.RealRim_LatrineStatus: Flush tank: {0} / {1} L Internal waste: {2} / {3} L Fecal sludge: {4} / {5} kg
LanguageData.RealRim_TroughStatus: Stored water: {0} / {1} L Current refill: {2} L/h
LanguageData.RealRim_PoolStatus: Pool water: {0} / {1} L ({2}) Water temperature: {3} Target temperature: {4} Network heating: {5} kW Air exchange: {6} kW Solar gain: {7} kW Night-sky loss: {8} kW Evaporation: {9} L/day Evaporation heat loss: {10} kW Rain collection: {11} L/day Fresh-water refill: {12} L/day Fill-flow setting: {13}%
LanguageData.RealRim_PoolDescription:
A swimming pool for swimming, relaxation and recreation. It must be at least 90% full and within a pawn's comfortable temperature range before it can be used.
Status entries: Pool water is the current volume and fill percentage. Water temperature is the measured pool temperature; target temperature controls heating from the heating-water network. Network heating is heat currently supplied by the pool heat exchanger. Air exchange is positive when surrounding air warms the pool and negative when it cools it. Solar gain is sunlight absorbed outdoors. Night-sky loss is radiative cooling on clear dark nights. Evaporation shows both water lost per day and the associated heat loss. Rain collection and fresh-water refill show current filling rates. Fill-flow setting limits automatic fresh-water refill.
LanguageData.RealRim_PoolNotFull: The swimming pool must be at least 90% full.
LanguageData.RealRim_NoFreshWater: No connected fresh water or insufficient stored water.
LanguageData.RealRim_NoWasteCapacity: No connected waste-water storage has enough water and sludge capacity.
LanguageData.RealRim_TroughEmpty: Not enough water in the trough.
LanguageData.RealRim_LatrineUnavailable: The latrine needs flush water or its internal waste storage must be emptied.
LanguageData.RealRim_ReasonNoStoredHeat: No usable heat in connected tanks.
LanguageData.RealRim_ReasonAmbientOutOfRange: Ambient temperature is outside the operating range.
LanguageData.RealRim_ReasonNoSoilInfiltration: Septic drainage requires natural soil and cannot operate on a gravship.
LanguageData.RealRim_ReasonNoHotWater: No sufficiently hot water is connected; cold water was used.
LanguageData.RealRim_DuplicateFluidPipe: A {0} pipe already occupies this tile.
LanguageData.RealRim_ReasonNoCoolantHeatCapacity: The coolant tank cannot absorb more extracted heat.
LanguageData.RealRim_HotWaterTankStatus: Domestic hot water: {0} / {1} L Temperature: {2} Heat-exchanger transfer: {3} kW Cold-water refill: {4} L/h Standing heat loss: {5} kW
LanguageData.RealRim_WaterPumpAutomationDesc: Enable automatic start/stop thresholds. When disabled, the pump runs whenever it is switched on, a source is connected, and storage has free capacity.
LanguageData.RealRim_WaterPumpConfigureDesc: Set the storage levels at which this pump starts and stops.
LanguageData.RealRim_WaterPumpThresholdHint: The stop threshold must remain at least 5 percentage points above the start threshold.
LanguageData.RealRim_HeatSourceConfigureTargetDesc: Set the heating-buffer temperature this active heat source maintains.
LanguageData.RealRim_HeatSourceTargetHint: A lower buffer temperature reduces the temperature lift required from a heat pump and normally improves its COP, but it must remain hot enough for radiators, pool heating and domestic-hot-water transfer. The source restarts 5 °C below the selected target.
LanguageData.RealRim_HeatingOverviewDesc: Open a live report for this connected heating-water network.
LanguageData.RealRim_HeatingReportDisconnected: This node is no longer connected to a heating-water network.
LanguageData.RealRim_HeatingReportHotWaterTankDetails: {0}, heat draw {1} kW, standing loss {2} kW
LanguageData.RealRim_IrrigationSprinklerDescription: Waters fertile ground once every morning through the fresh-water network and replenishes DBH's temporary irrigation fertility bonus with the original one-hour pulse cycle. Water use is based on the unobstructed spray footprint: 5 L/m² per cycle, or 725 L for the full 145 m² radius; only fertile cells receive DBH's fertility bonus. The original rotating spray and sprinkler sound are retained.
LanguageData.RealRim_FireSprinklerDescription: Automatically activates when fire or extreme heat is detected and can also be triggered manually. It draws continuously from the fresh-water network while spraying and cools overheated indoor rooms. Design flow is proportional to the unobstructed protected area, up to 80 L/min at the full 145 m² radius.
LanguageData.RealRim_SprinklerRadiusDownDesc: Reduce the sprinkler radius by 1 m. Water demand and protected area are recalculated from the new radius.
LanguageData.RealRim_SprinklerRadiusUpDesc: Increase the sprinkler radius by 1 m. Water demand and protected area are recalculated from the new radius.
LanguageData.RealRim_SprinklerAlreadyHere: A sprinkler already occupies this tile.
LanguageData.RealRim_SprinklerNoEligibleCells: No unobstructed fertile ground is within the selected radius.
LanguageData.RealRim_SprinklerIrrigationPartial: Irrigation was applied to only {0} of {1} cells because DBH's irrigation grid stopped accepting updates.
LanguageData.RealRim_SprinklerIrrigationUnavailable: DBH's irrigation fertility grid is unavailable.
LanguageData.RealRim_FireSprinklerStatus: Sprinkler: {0} Radius: {1} m Protected area: {2} m² Design flow: {3} L/min Current flow: {4} L/min Total water used: {5} L {6}
LanguageData.RealRim_HotWaterOverviewDesc: Open a live report for this connected domestic hot-water network.
LanguageData.RealRim_HotWaterReportDisconnected: This node is no longer connected to a domestic hot-water network.
LanguageData.RealRim_HotWaterReportHeatingInput: Heat received from heating circuit: {0} kW
LanguageData.RealRim_HotWaterReportDraw: Hot-water delivery: {0} L/h, useful-heat draw {1} kW
LanguageData.RealRim_HotWaterReportTankDetails: {0} / {1} L, {2}, heat input {3} kW, refill {4} L/h, standing loss {5} kW
LanguageData.RealRim_HotWaterReportFixtureDetails: last mixed-water temperature {0}, total mixed water used {1} L
